nodes.name: ⏰ Daily Health Check (6 AM)
nodes.notes: Runs every morning at 6 AM. Checks uptime, plugin updates, broken links, post count growth. Sends you one clean digest email. Never auto-changes anything — alerts only.

nodes.name: 🌐 Check Site Uptime
nodes.notes: Simple GET request to homepage. If it fails or returns non-200, site is down. Timeout 15s. Runs in parallel with all other checks.

nodes.name: 🔌 Check Plugin Updates
nodes.notes: Fetches plugin list via WP REST API. Requires 'plugins' REST route enabled — needs admin-level Application Password. Returns plugin name, version, update status.

nodes.name: 📊 Check Post Stats
nodes.notes: Gets total post count from X-WP-Total header. Tracks blog growth over time.

nodes.name: 📝 Fetch Recent Posts for Link Check
nodes.notes: Fetches last 20 posts to scan for broken internal links. Checks that all internal hrefs resolve.

nodes.name: 📊 Log to WP_Health_Log Sheet
nodes.notes: Logs daily health snapshot. Lets you track trends: post growth, plugin debt accumulating, health score over time.

parameters.jsCode:
// Build the HTML email digest const r = $input.first().json; const alertsHtml = r.health.alerts.length > 0 ? r.health.alerts.map(a => `
${a}
`).join('') : '
✅ No alerts — everything looks good!
'; const pluginRowsHtml = (r.plugins.plugins_to_update || []).length > 0 ? r.plugins.plugins_to_update.map(p => `${p.name}${p.current_version}→ ${p.new_version}` ).join('') : 'All plugins up to date ✅'; const missingLinksHtml = r.content.posts_missing_links_titles.length > 0 ? '
    ' + r.content.posts_missing_links_titles.map(t => `
  • ${t}
    • `).join('') + '
' : '

All recent posts have internal links ✅

'; const gradeColor = r.health.grade === 'A' ? '#28A745' : r.health.grade === 'B' ? '#17A2B8' : r.health.grade === 'C' ? '#FFC107' : '#DC3545'; const emailHtml = `

ClearStack Studio

WordPress Daily Health Report · ${r.date}

${r.health.grade}
${r.health.score}/100
Health Score · Site: ${r.uptime.status}

⚡ Alerts

${alertsHtml}
${r.content.total_published_posts}
Published Posts
${r.plugins.updates_needed}
Plugin Updates
${r.content.posts_missing_internal_links}
Posts Missing Links

🔌 Plugin Status

${pluginRowsHtml}
Plugin Current Available
${r.plugins.updates_needed > 0 ? '

⚠️ Update plugins manually in WP Admin → Plugins. Never auto-update on production.

' : ''}

🔗 Posts Missing Internal Links

${missingLinksHtml} ${r.content.posts_missing_internal_links > 0 ? '

WF10A runs daily at 2 AM to auto-insert links. Review Internal_Links_Log sheet for suggestions.

' : ''}

🚀 Quick Actions

${r.plugins.updates_needed > 0 ? '• Update plugins →
' : ''} • WP Admin →   • All Posts →   • View Sheets →

ClearStack Studio · Automated Health Report · Alerts only, nothing was changed automatically

`; return [{ json: { email_html: emailHtml, subject: `${r.health.grade === 'A' ? '✅' : r.health.grade === 'B' ? '🟡' : '🚨'} ClearStack WP Health: ${r.health.grade} (${r.health.score}/100) · ${r.date}`, has_alerts: r.health.alerts.length > 0, is_critical: !r.uptime.online, report: r }}];

nodes.name: ⚙️ Build HTML Email Digest
nodes.notes: Builds a professional HTML email digest with health score, color-coded grade, plugin update table, missing links list, and quick action links to WP Admin.

nodes.name: 📧 Send Daily Digest Email
nodes.notes: SETUP: Configure SMTP in n8n Settings → Credentials → SMTP. Use Gmail App Password or Postmark (free 100 emails/month). Replace YOUR_EMAIL with your address.

nodes.name: 🔀 Is Critical Alert?
nodes.notes: If site is DOWN, fires an immediate additional alert — doesn't wait for email. Routes to Telegram/WhatsApp for instant notification.

nodes.name: 📱 Telegram — Critical Alert
nodes.notes: SETUP: (1) Message @BotFather on Telegram → /newbot → copy token. (2) Message @userinfobot → copy your chat_id. (3) Fill both values. Free forever. Only fires when site is DOWN.

main.node: 📝 Fetch Recent Posts for Link Check

meta.description: Workflow 10B: WordPress Health Monitor. Runs daily at 6 AM. Parallel checks: uptime ping, plugin update status, post count, recent posts missing internal links. Aggregates into health score (A-D grade). Sends beautifully formatted HTML email digest. Critical alerts (site down) fire Telegram message instantly. Never auto-changes anything — alerts only.
